commands: python3 tools/qa/sg02_cross_platform_receipt.py --golden-match target/release/golden_match --expected tools/qa/sg02_golden_hashes.json --source-revision a4775aba347dc1f48f1ddb68bda61a1845ec9920 --platform-label Linux --out SG02_LINUX_RECEIPT.json
python3 tools/qa/sg02_cross_platform_reduce.py --expected tools/qa/sg02_golden_hashes.json --receipt SG02_LINUX_RECEIPT.json --require Linux --out SG02_LINUX_REDUCED.json

non_evidence.windows_cross_build: A GNU-target PE32+ binary compiled locally, but was not counted as Windows execution evidence.
non_evidence.wine_execution: No Wine result is admitted as Windows evidence.
non_evidence.linux_only_reduction: The reducer passed only with --require Linux and rejects a required Windows receipt when it is missing.

no_baked_runtime.promotion_effect: Closes the local no-baked runtime boundary only; Windows and Steam Deck parity remain blocked.

quantized_substep_contact_packet.quantization: Round finite non-negative metres to integer micrometres; reject non-finite/negative measurements to zero; saturate finite overflow at u32::MAX; derive overlap volume by checked-width integer cubing with u64 saturation.
quantized_substep_contact_packet.presentation_boundary: grab07_capture emits canonical integer fields plus derived human-readable millimetre mirrors; mirrors are not serialized truth.
quantized_substep_contact_packet.focused_gate: 7 duel_world tests passed, including Eq/serde schema/rounding/saturation regression.
quantized_substep_contact_packet.promotion_effect: Closes the local 120 Hz substep contact-packet quantization gap only; broader contact samples and cross-platform receipts remain separate gates.

quantized_grab_contact_authority.focused_gate: 9 grab-contact fixtures, 12 grab plan-phase tests, quantizer rounding/non-finite/saturation regression, serde schema regression, and focused clippy passed.
quantized_grab_contact_authority.promotion_effect: Closes floating-point authority in secure-grab contact samples and admission comparisons only; cross-platform receipts remain required.

unblock.windows: Push a revision containing .github/workflows/ci.yml and obtain the SG02 Linux/Windows receipt-reduction artifact from GitHub Actions; do not substitute a local cross-build or Wine run.
unblock.steamdeck: Provision a real Steam Deck self-hosted GitHub Actions runner labelled self-hosted, Linux, X64, steam-deck. Push a revision containing .github/workflows/sg02-cross-platform.yml, dispatch that workflow on one revision, and retain its three platform receipts plus reduced artifact.

remaining_integrity_gate: SG02-NO-BAKED-RUNTIME-BOUNDARY-001 passed in the verified worktree; commit binding remains pending. SG02 itself remains blocked on real Windows and Steam Deck receipts.
